Use Python to inspect the evidence, refine that world model from the newest history, and search or score candidate actions or short sequences against the current goal as you currently understand it.
Maintain a compact working world model of what the current level seems to contain, what actions appear to do, what the goal seems to be, what is still uncertain, and what plan currently looks best.

Do not quote or place tool-call markup inside explanatory text; when you decide to call the tool, emit the tool call itself.
If you use MOUSE, include integer row and col arguments.
EFFICIENCY BUDGET — your score on each level is (baseline_actions / your_actions)^2, so every wasted action costs you quadratically.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the current image:
- Top row: blocks at cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29 cleared (below purple blocks)
- Top row: blocks at cols 31-35, 37-41, 43-47, 49-53 remain
- Bottom row: blocks at cols 13-17, 25-29 cleared
- Bottom row: block at cols 19-23 remains (above player)
- Bottom row: blocks at cols 31-35, 37-41, 43-47, 49-53 remain
So I've cleared 5 blocks total (3 top row + 2 bottom row). The remaining blocks are:
- Top row: cols 31-35, 37-41, 43-47, 49-53 (4 blocks)
- Bottom row: cols 19-23, 31-35, 37-41, 43-47, 49-53 (5 blocks)
The block at cols 19-23 in the bottom row is still there and I can't click it directly (causes game_over).
Let me think about this differently. Maybe the goal is NOT to clear all blocks, but to clear blocks in a specific pattern. The purple blocks at the top might indicate which columns to clear.
Purple blocks are at cols 14-16, 20-22, 26-28. These align with green blocks at cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29.
I've cleared:
- Top row: cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29 (all 3 below purple blocks)
- Bottom row: cols 13-17, 25-29 (2 of 3 below purple blocks, skipping 19-23)
The remaining block at cols 19-23 in the bottom row is the problematic one. Maybe I need to clear all OTHER blocks first, then this one becomes safe?
Or maybe the goal is to clear only the blocks below the purple blocks, and the level completes when I clear the last one. But I can't click the bottom row block at cols 19-23.
Wait, let me reconsider. Maybe I need to clear the remaining blocks (the ones NOT below purple blocks) first, and then the block at cols 19-23 becomes safe. Let me try clearing the remaining top row blocks first.
